queries.question: Show all banquet halls and conference rooms where either can hold 200 people.
queries.sql:
SELECT EventSpaces.Name 
FROM EventSpaces
WHERE (EventSpaces.Event_Space = "Banquet Hall" OR EventSpaces.Event_Space = "Conference Room") AND EventSpaces.Capacity = 200
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?eventspaces a :EventSpaces .
  ?eventspaces p:name ?name .
  ?eventspaces p:Event_Space ?event_space_w .
  ?eventspaces p:Event_Space ?event_space_w2 .
  ?eventspaces p:Capacity ?capacity_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?event_space_w) = "Banquet Hall" || STR(?event_space_w2) = "Conference Room")) && (STR(?capacity_w) = "200" || STR(?capacity_w) = "200.0")))
}

queries.question: List all banquet halls and conference rooms with a 200 person capacity.
queries.sql:
SELECT EventSpaces.Name 
FROM EventSpaces
WHERE EventSpaces.Event_Space = "Banquet Hall" OR EventSpaces.Event_Space = "Conference Room" AND EventSpaces.Capacity = 200
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?eventspaces a :EventSpaces .
  ?eventspaces p:name ?name .
  ?eventspaces p:Event_Space ?event_space_w .
  ?eventspaces p:Event_Space ?event_space_w2 .
  ?eventspaces p:Capacity ?capacity_w .
  FILTER((STR(?event_space_w) = "Banquet Hall" || (STR(?event_space_w2) = "Conference Room" && (STR(?capacity_w) = "200" || STR(?capacity_w) = "200.0"))))
}
